Champions: Deal 300/450/675% Ability Power magic damage to the current target and 150/225/335% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies. Fated Bonus: Gain 30% Ability Power.
Fire a bullet towards the farthest enemy, dealing 700% Attack Damage plus 100/150/225% Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy hit.

Gain 280/350/420% Ability Power Shield for 4 seconds and breathe a cone of fire, dealing 200/300/450% Ability Power magic damage, Burning, and Wounding enemies hit for 9 seconds. Burn: Deal 1% of the target's max Health as true damage every second Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%
Deal 190/285/450% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies. For the next 4 seconds, attacks deal 80/120/200% Ability Power bonus magic damage.
Gain 275/325/375% Ability Power Shield for 5 seconds. Garen's next attack deals 450% Attack Damage physical damage.

Gain 90 Armor and Magic Resist for the next 2 seconds. Afterwards, deal 100/150/225% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies. The current target takes 250/375/560% Ability Power magic damage and is Stunned for 1.5 seconds.
Leap towards the lowest Health enemy within 3 hexes and deal 340/340/350% Attack Damage physical damage.

Passive: Gain 10/12/20 permanent Health for each gold gained from interest. (Total: ) Active: Heal 350/400/475% Ability Power Health over 2 seconds. Kobuko's next attack deals 15% Health bonus magic damage. In Hyper Roll, instead gain 60/80/200 permanent Health per Round.
Deal 160/240/335% Ability Power magic damage to the lowest Health enemy within range. Every 3 casts, gain +1 Attack Range.
For 8 seconds, gain 75/90/110% Ability Power Armor and attacks deal 90/120/160% Armor magic damage to enemies in a cone.
Gain 50 Armor and Magic Resist for 4 seconds. Stun nearby enemies for 1 second and deal 60/90/135% Ability Power plus 10/15/25% maximum Health magic damage.
Gain 95/95/110% Attack Damage and grant 0.15/0.2/0.3% Ability Power Attack Speed to self and adjacent allies for 6 seconds.

Passive: Attacks while Shielded deal 40/60/90% Armor + Magic Resist bonus magic damage. Active: Gain 300/350/400% Armor + Magic Resist Shield for 5 seconds and deal 200/300/450% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. Fated Bonus: Gain 300% Shield at the start of combat.
20% Shred the current target for 4 seconds and deal 260/390/600% Ability Power magic damage to them. Heal 120/150/200% Ability Power Health. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist
Passive: Gain 2% Attack Damage upon attacking or getting hit, up to 45 times. Active: Fling a boulder at the current target, dealing 310/310/320% Attack Damage physical damage to targets in a line.
Grant 120/150/200% Ability Power Shield to the 2 lowest Health allies for 4 seconds. Then, deal 180/270/415% Ability Power magic damage to the 2 nearest enemies.
Dash away from the current target and deal 135/200/300% Ability Power magic damage to them and 70/105/165% Ability Power magic damage to the nearest enemy. Fated Bonus: Gain 18% Attack Speed.

Throw a spirit bunny towards the farthest enemy, dealing 225/340/525% Ability Power magic damage to enemies along the way, reduced by 30% each time it hits an enemy. The first 2 enemies hit are Stunned for 1.5 seconds.

Hop into the air, reducing damage taken by 30/30/35% and Healing 300/350/400% Ability Power Health over 2 seconds. After, slam down and deal 200/300/475% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies.
For 4 seconds, attacks deal 20/30/45% Attack Damage physical damage to the target and 20/30/45% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies behind them. Qiyana will dash to find the best angle.

Deal 190/190/200% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target. Every 3rd cast, instead deal 300/300/310% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and enemies adjacent to them, then heal for 175/225/275% Ability Power Health.
Fire a laser 2 Hexes beyond the current target, dealing 20/25/35% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies hit. Grant 20/25/35% Attack Damage to Senna and allies to the left and right for 4 seconds.
For 4 seconds, reduce damage taken by 40/50/70% Ability Power for Shen and 15/20/30% Ability Power for adjacent allies. Shen's next 3 attacks deal 100/150/235% Armor bonus true damage.
Throw a spoiled dumpling at the nearest non-poisoned enemy, poisoning them for 400/600/1150% Ability Power magic damage over 8 seconds.
Sap power from the 2 nearest enemies, gaining 300/360/420 max Health and dealing 160/240/375% Ability Power magic damage to them over 3 seconds.
Summon 2 Vine Lashers that attack the nearest enemy 3 times. Their attacks deal 95/140/220% Ability Power magic damage and Wound their targets for 6 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

Rain meteors through the row with the most total enemy Health. Meteors deal 380/570/900% Ability Power magic damage split between all enemies hit. Deal 160/240/380% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. All enemies hit are 20% Shredded for 6 seconds. Grant 20/25/30% Attack Speed split amongst allies in Alune's row for 5 seconds. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

Heal 150/200/250% Ability Power Health and adjacent allies for 40/60/100% Ability Power Health. For the next 3 seconds, shed tears, dealing 150/225/350% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies.
20% Sunder the nearest 3 enemies for 7 seconds. Then fire 3 shots at them, dealing 30/45/70% Attack Damage physical damage each. Fated Bonus: Gain 25% Attack Damage. Sunder: Reduce Armor
For the next 6 seconds, attacks instead throw 2 Meeps, each dealing 65/65/70% Attack Damage physical damage and 24/36/60% Ability Power magic damage.

Heal 275/300/375% Ability Power Health and create a 1-hex sacred zone around Diana for 4 seconds, taking 30/30/35% reduced damage from enemies outside the zone. While the zone is up, Diana's attacks deal 75/110/180% Ability Power bonus magic damage.
Gain 250/300/350% Shield and summon a tentacle near the target for 4 seconds. Tentacles slam every 2 seconds, dealing 80/120/180% Ability Power magic damage and healing Illaoi for 30/35/40 Health.

Passive: Each time your team loses 20% of their total Health, gain 8 Ability Power for the rest of combat. Active: Mana Reave the largest group of enemies within range. Deal 260/390/600% Ability Power magic damage to the center enemy and 120/180/290% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies. Mana Reave: Increase max Mana by 20% until the next cast

Gain 200/250/300% Health Shield for 3 seconds and deal 300/450/700% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. If Tahm Kench has more Health than them, deal 300/450/700% Ability Power magic damage instead. Otherwise, gain 200/250/300% Ability Power more Shield.

Grant 360/400/450% Ability Power Shield to Thresh and the lowest Health ally for 4 seconds and deal 100/150/250% Ability Power magic damage to enemies adjacent to both. Thresh shares 15/15/20% of his Armor and Magic Resist with the shielded ally for 6 seconds. Fated Bonus: Gain 18 Armor and Magic Resist.
Gain 40/40/50% Attack Damage for 6 seconds. Jump on the current target and deal 300/300/305% Attack Damage physical damage to adjacent enemies, before bouncing to a safe location.

Empower the next three attacks. The first two heal for 150/180/240% Ability Power Health and deal 35/50/80% Ability Power bonus magic damage. The final attack deals 80/120/185% Health + Ability Power magic damage and Stuns the target for 1 second.

Dash in spirit form to the farthest enemy within 3 Hexes for 3 seconds, dealing 165/165/180% Attack Damage physical damage and Wounding enemies along the way for 5 seconds. While in spirit form, gain a 250/300/375% Ability Power Shield and 75% Attack Speed. Afterwards, Yone returns to his starting position. Each cast this combat increases his dash range by 1 Hex. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

Passive: Kills increase the number of ricochets by 1 for the rest of combat. Active: Fire a missile dealing 280/420/650% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. The missile ricochets to the farthest unit within 2 hexes, dealing 140/210/325% Ability Power magic damage.

Passive: Heal 4% Health Health when damaging a Burning enemy. Active: On first cast, hop on Tibbers, gaining 15% Health max Health and Stunning enemies within 2 hexes for 1.5 seconds. Deal 150/225/2000% Ability Power magic damage, Burn, and Wound enemies within 2 hexes for 5 seconds. Burn: Deal 1% of the target's max Health as true damage every second Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

Passive: Start with 15 arrows. Gain 1/1/3 every 3 attacks. Active: Fire a volley split between the current target and the 3 closest enemies within range, dealing 40/40/100% Attack Damage plus 4/6/20% Ability Power physical damage per stored arrow.

Taunt enemies within 3 hexes and gain 130/160/1000 Armor and Magic Resist for 4/4/2 seconds. Galio is immobile and unstoppable during this time. Afterwards, deal 100/150/1800% Ability Power magic damage to all enemies in range and grant a 160/200/2000% Ability Power Shield to allies in range for 4 seconds.

Fire 20 waves at the current target over 2 seconds, each dealing 40/40/100% Attack Damage plus 8/12/36% Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy hit. If they are hit by 10 waves, they take 65/65/140% Attack Damage plus 8/12/36% Ability Power damage per wave instead.

On first cast, transform, dealing 400/400/1000% Attack Damage physical damage to nearby enemies. While transformed, gain 30% Critical Strike Chance and critical attacks damage adjacent enemies. If the spin only hits one enemy, the damage is increased by 100%. Subsequent casts deal 240/240/600% Attack Damage plus 30/45/135% Ability Power physical damage to units in a line through the target.

Deal 450/450/900% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target, Stun them, and kick them. Enemies hit by the kicked target take 150/150/300% Attack Damage plus 100/150/400% Ability Power physical damage.

Hurl an orb towards the current target, dealing 240/360/900% Ability Power magic damage to the first enemy hit and adjacent enemies. It continues rolling as a smaller orb, dealing 240/360/900% Ability Power magic damage to enemies it hits. Every third cast launches a mega orb at her target that deals 360/540/1600% Ability Power magic damage and splits into 3/3/5 smaller orbs that roll towards the farthest enemies.
Create a blizzard around a random enemy that deals 265/400/2000% Ability Power magic damage over 3 seconds and Chills for 1 second. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 10%
Send 3 shockwaves towards the most enemies in a line, dealing 150/225/1000% Ability Power magic damage and Stunning all enemies hit for 1.75/2/8 seconds.

Gain 300/350/1200% Ability Power plus 15% maximum Health Shield for 4 seconds. Channel and forge unstoppably over 2 seconds, dealing 300/450/1500% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies over the duration. Afterwards, toss an ephemeral Completed item to the nearest ally.

Dash around the target and slam, dealing 200/300/1200% Ability Power magic damage and healing for 110/130/600% Ability Power Health. Then, swipe twice, dealing 90/135/550% Ability Power magic damage to nearby enemies.

Passive: Start combat with 6/6/10 butterflies and gain one every 1 casts. Active: Throw all butterflies at the current target, dealing 45/70/180% Ability Power magic damage for each butterfly. Fated Bonus: Deal 11% more damage.

Fire a beam through the current target, dealing 500/750/5000% Ability Power magic damage to enemies hit. Spawn a Guardian adjacent to the first enemy hit with 1100/1500/8000 Health. The Guardian does not move or attack.

Create an expanding paint pool around the most units that heals allies within for 40/60/1000% Ability Power Health every second for 3 seconds. After 3 seconds, it explodes, healing allies within for 80/120/1000% Ability Power Health and dealing 180/270/2000% Ability Power magic damage to enemies.

Passive: Attacks send blades that dart between enemies, dealing 150/150/1400% Attack Damage physical damage and 30% Sunder for 5 seconds. Cast every 8 attacks. Active: Command the blades to swiftly strike the three lowest Health enemies, dealing 300/300/2000% Attack Damage physical damage and applying on-hit effects. Irelia converts 25% of bonus attack speed into faster blade movement, and 70% into Attack Damage. Sunder: Reduce Armor

Place the current target in a teapot, Stunning them for 3/3/15 seconds and dealing 640/960/9600% Ability Power magic damage. If they die, Lissandra has a 50% chance to turn them into a loot orb. Otherwise, throw the teapot at the largest group of enemies, dealing 150/225/600% Ability Power magic damage to all enemies hit.

Dash into the largest group of enemies, dealing 200/300/1200% Ability Power magic damage to enemies in a 2-hex range. Gain 200/250/1000% Ability Power Shield for each enemy hit, and land, dealing 300/450/2000% Ability Power magic damage to the current target.

Passive: At the start of combat, squat adjacent units in the same row. Permanently gain 2% Attack Damage for each 1000 Health squatted. Active: Slam the current target forward, Stunning them and dealing 270/270/9001% Attack Damage physical damage. Deal 120/120/120% Attack Damage plus 30/45/2000% Ability Power plus 8/12/1000% of the target's maximum health as physical damage to enemies within 2.5 hexes.

Ram Slam: Gain 300/375/5000% Ability Power Shield for 3/3/10 seconds and charge through the current target, briefly knocking up any enemies he hits. Grab the nearest enemy and slam them into the ground, dealing 300/450/4800% Ability Power total magic damage to them and adjacent enemies. Tiger Strikes: Gain 60/70/500% Attack Speed and empower Udyr's attacks for the next 6/6/30 seconds to strike 4/4/6 additional times dealing 150/225/4500% Ability Power bonus magic damage.

Cycle through the following abilities: (1) Throw staff out, dealing 300/300/900% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and Stunning them for 1.5/1.5/8 seconds. (2) Spin, dealing 300/300/900% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1-hex range. (3) Dash to hit the most enemies in a 3-hex line, then slam down staff dealing 300/300/1500% Attack Damage plus 70/105/155% Ability Power physical damage to enemies hit.

Leap into the air and become untargetable, firing 12/12/28 feathers at the 4 nearest enemies that deal 50/50/150% Attack Damage plus 10/15/60% Ability Power physical damage. When she lands, recall the feathers, dealing 30/45/150% Ability Power physical damage to enemies hit.
Origins: After 8 seconds of combat, the Dragon strikes the board, dealing true damage to enemies and granting all allies Attack Speed for the rest of combat.    • (2): 5% Health damage, 12% AS    • (3): 10% Health damage, 18% AS    • (4): 10% Health damage, 18% AS, Stuns for 1.5s    • (5): 25% Health damage, 40% AS

Dryads gain Ability Power and 150 Health. Each enemy death grants permanent additional Health.    • (2): +15 AP; 3 HP per enemy death    • (4): +30 AP; 7 HP per enemy death    • (6): +55 AP; 10 HP per enemy death

Hover one Fated unit over another to form a pair and unlock a Fated Bonus. Your pair gains 20% Health.    • (3): Pair gets the Fated Bonus    • (5): All Fated units get 200% of the Fated Bonus    • (7): All Fated units get 300% of the Fated Bonus    • (10): All Fated units get 300% of EVERY Fated Bonus

When you lose a fight, gain Luck (lose it when you win).    • (3): Roll a die; that many player combats until a Festival where Luck converts to rewards    • (5): Heal 2 player health at the start of each player combat    • (7): Fortune smiles! Extra rewards and more luck every turn, Festival every turn

Upon dealing or taking damage 5 times, Ghostly units send 2 spectres to haunt nearby enemies and heal 2% max Health every 2 seconds. Haunted enemies take bonus damage per spectre and pass spectres on death.    • (2): 5% per spectre    • (4): 10% per spectre    • (6): 16% per spectre    • (8): 36% per spectre

Heavenly units grant unique stats to your team, increased by each Heavenly unit in play; Heavenly units themselves gain 70% more.    • (2): 100% bonus    • (3): 110% bonus    • (4): 125% bonus    • (5): 145% bonus    • (6): 170% bonus    • (7): 200% bonus

Gain unique Inkshadow items (change each game). Inkshadow champions gain bonus damage and damage reduction.    • (3): 1 item, 5% bonus damage/DR    • (5): 2 items, 16% more bonus damage/DR    • (7): 4 items, 22% more bonus damage/DR
(Unique) Rakan & Xayah are the same Lover unit. The fielded Lover depends on front/back placement; the other provides a bonus effect. Front: Trickshot Xayah. Back: Altruist Rakan.

Mythic champions gain Health, Ability Power, and Attack Damage. After 4 player combats they become Epic, increasing the bonus by 50%.    • (3): +8% HP, 11% AP/AD    • (5): +18% HP, 22% AP/AD    • (7): +25% HP, 35% AP/AD    • (10): Instantly Epic, bonus +250%

After casting, Porcelain champions boil, gaining Attack Speed and taking less damage for 4 seconds.    • (2): +30% AS, 20% reduced damage    • (4): +55% AS, 33% reduced damage    • (6): +100% AS, 50% reduced damage

Storyweavers summon and evolve a Hero (Kayle), gaining max Health at each breakpoint; Kayle's HP/AP scale with Storyweaver star level, and she gains Attack Speed per Stage.    • (3): Pick a supportive effect; +60 HP    • (5): Pick a combat effect; +100 HP    • (7): Pick a combat effect; +150 HP    • (10): Ascend; +250 HP

The moon illuminates hexes, Shielding units placed there at combat start. Umbral units in illuminated hexes execute low-Health enemies.    • (2): 200 Shield, 10% execute    • (4): 450 Shield, 18% execute, more hexes illuminated    • (6): 900 Shield, 25% execute, whole board illuminated    • (9): 100% loot chance on execute, 60% execute
Classes: Altruists heal the lowest-Health ally for 15% of the damage they deal. Your team gains Armor and Magic Resist.    • (2): +10 Armor/MR    • (3): +25 Armor/MR    • (4): +40 Armor/MR

Arcanists gain Ability Power and grant Ability Power to allies.    • (2): +20 AP to all allies    • (4): +45 AP for Arcanists, +20 for others    • (6): +80 AP for Arcanists, +40 for others    • (8): +125 AP for Arcanists, +125 for others
(Unique) The Artist paints the champion placed in a special bench slot, granting a 1-star copy when complete. Rounds needed to complete = unit cost.

Behemoths gain increased Armor and Magic Resist. When a Behemoth dies, the nearest Behemoth ally gains 50% more for a few seconds.    • (2): +25 Armor/MR    • (4): +55 Armor/MR    • (6): +85 Armor/MR    • (8): +115 Armor/MR

Your team gains 100 flat max Health. Bruisers gain additional max Health.    • (2): +20% max HP    • (4): +40% max HP    • (6): +60-65% max HP    • (8): +75-80% max HP, periodic bonus physical damage on next attack

Duelist units gain Attack Speed per attack, stacking up to 12 times; at higher breakpoints Duelists also take less damage.    • (2): +5% AS per stack    • (4): +9% AS per stack    • (6): +13% AS per stack, 12% less damage taken    • (8): +18% AS per stack, 18% less damage taken

(Varies each game) Your team gains bonus damage, more based on Level. After combat, XP is stored in a Soul Core; sell it to claim the XP.    • (3): 1% damage per Level, 1 XP    • (5): 3% damage per Level, 2 XP
(Unique) Every 3 casts, Wukong's staff grows, modifying his Abilities.
Every 3 seconds, your units gain Mana.    • (2): +5 Mana to all allies    • (4): +20 Mana to Invokers, +5 to others    • (6): +35 Mana to Invokers, +15 to others
Reapers' Abilities can Critically Strike.    • (2): +25% Critical Strike Chance    • (4): Additionally, Reapers' hits Bleed enemies for bonus true damage over time

Combat start: allies in the front 2 rows gain Omnivamp; allies in the back 2 rows gain Ability Power.    • (2): +11% Omnivamp or +15 AP    • (3): +18% Omnivamp or +30 AP    • (4): +30% Omnivamp or +45 AP    • (5): +44% Omnivamp or +75 AP
Innate: +1 Attack Range. Snipers deal more damage to farther targets.    • (2): 7-8% damage per hex    • (4): 15-18% damage per hex    • (6): 30-35% damage per hex, +2 additional Attack Range
(Unique) The first time Udyr drops below 50% Health, he heals to full, gains movement speed, and his Ability changes from Ram Slam to Tiger Strikes.

All Abilities of Trickshot units ricochet, each bounce dealing a percentage of the previous hit's damage.    • (2): 1 ricochet at 40% of previous damage    • (4): 2 ricochets at 60% of previous damage
Warden units gain damage reduction, with an additional bonus for the first 10 seconds of combat.    • (2): 10% damage reduction    • (4): 20% damage reduction    • (6): 33% damage reduction
